expectations.text: Scope mode is detected as 'uncommitted' (reviewing local staged/unstaged changes, not branch comparison or PR)
expectations.evidence: scope-determination.md: '## Mode Detected: Uncommitted' with 'The user said review my local changes -- this maps to Uncommitted mode per the skill mode detection rules.' Correctly ran git diff --stat and git diff --staged --stat.

expectations.text: Only standard and security review types are selected — NOT performance, architecture, test-coverage, or silent-failure
expectations.evidence: review-selection.md shows explicit table with Standard=Yes, Security=Yes, and Performance/Architecture/Test Coverage/Silent Failure all marked 'No | Not requested'. States '2 review types selected: standard-review, security-review.'

expectations.text: No more than 2 review subagents were launched (one for standard, one for security)
expectations.evidence: orchestration-log.md confirms only 2 reviews executed (standard-review and security-review). Agent tool was unavailable so executed inline, but only 2 review passes were performed as requested.

expectations.text: A final report file (final-report.md) exists with review findings
expectations.evidence: final-report.md exists with complete synthesis output. Clean review — no findings reached >=80 confidence threshold. Includes verification summary, all four logs, positive observations, and structured JSON block.
